properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Holding my palm in my hand Holding my palm in my hand Where the eagles are gathered, worshipping the Lamb, I am holding my palm in my hand

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I see all Israel in their homeland When I see prodigals come home Then, this evil world, clothed with darkness in their souls, very soon to hear from our Redeemer The Word-Bride, we are sealed and made ready, For the holy New Jerusalem I am rejoicing and singing "Shalom!" holding my palm in my hand

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I’m not boasting about much revelation I’m not boasting about much inspiration But when I look within, and miss Elijah from the scene; I believe and fear'cause I know who is here About two hundred pounds of olive skinned complexion Pouring out His fullness unto man Like John, I shout, "Hallelujah!" Holding my palm in my hand

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And when I hear God’s Holy Word revealing All the mysteries of Christ the Son of Man I recognize my day and what the Spirit says, “Come out of Laodicea” For the white horse rider will take the hindmost, So come into the Royal Holy Ghost And the Spirit and the Bride say, “Come, come, come, ” Holding my palm in my hand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And when I feel that hot Shekinah glory, drawing me deeper into love’s veil And I feel those flames of light, changing my robes to white, to a place where I could never fail For it was by predestination He came to dwell in me, His chosen one So let the winds, and the waves, and Satan storm, I will be holding my palm in my hand

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: /: Waving my palm in my hand :/ Where the eagles are gathered, worshipping the Lamb, I am waving my palm in my hand
